title: Moderation Update — 2026-04-29
body: Three high-severity reports reviewed and resolved: (1) spam_wave_42 banned for posting phishing links across 6 channels; (2) toxic_runner banned for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers; (3) report against core_maintainer closed as false positive — mass reports were the result of brigading after a moderation decision. Community safety remains a priority. Report abuse if you see it.
